The person sponsoring you can check the status of your application by using our online tool .

items: This tool lets you securely view the status of your application online.
You’ll need to
bullets: gather all the documents about the application
have the identification numbers from them ready

sections.heading: How to check your application status
There’s a new way to check your application status
items: Use the application status tracker (opens in a new tab) to get updates about your application. To create an account you need your
bullets: unique client identifier (UCI)
application number

sections.heading: Online applications
items: If you’re applying to extend or change the conditions of your study permit, you can’t use the application status tracker. Sign in to your account to check your application status. Click “Check status and messages” under View my submitted applications or profiles section.
Sign in to your account

sections.heading: Paper applications
items: You can link your application to an online account. In your account, you can see the status of your application and receive messages about your application.
Link your paper application to your online account

joint assistance program
sponsorship agreement
community sponsors

sections.heading: How to check your application status
items: The Client Application Status tool allows you to securely view the status of your application online. It’s updated daily .
Before checking your application status you will need to
Check the client application status tool
bullets: gather all the documents you have received regarding your application and
have your identification numbers from these documents to log in

sections.heading: Processing times
items: If you cannot use the check application status tool, you can check processing times to see how long it normally takes to process your type of application.
Check processing times

sections.heading: Adult or minor applicant who has an AOR and an existing citizenship tracker account: Becoming a Canadian citizen (grant of citizenship)
Wait until you receive your AOR
Wait until you receive your AOR (Minor)
When we’ll receive your application
bullets: You have to wait for us to receive your application by mail.
If you have a tracking number with a courier or postal service, you can check if they delivered your application to us.
After we check that your application is complete , we’ll send you the AOR.

application number

sections.heading: Contact us to get your application number or unique client identifier (UCI)
items: When we receive your application, we won’t automatically send you a confirmation.
Contact the Canadian embassy, high commission or consulate where you submitted your application to
bullets: confirm that we received your application
get your unique client identifier (UCI) (opens in a new tab)

sections.heading: Search of citizenship records: Submitted online
Check your application status
items: Sign in to your account to check your application status. Under View my submitted applications or profiles , click Check status and messages .
Sign in to your account

sections.heading: Search of citizenship records in Canada or the United States: Submitted by mail
Check your application status
items: You can contact our Client Support Centre to get an update on your application status. Our Client Support Centre agents
bullets: can give you information about your application status
do not have more information on processing times and can’t tell you how much longer it will take to process your application

sections.heading: Travel documents for non-Canadians (refugee travel documents and certificates of identity)
bullets: The service standard for refugee travel documents and certificates of identity is 20 business days . This is our commitment to process your application in a certain amount of time, under normal circumstances.
This is our commitment to process your application in a certain amount of time, under normal circumstances.
If it’s been less than this, we suggest you wait to contact us. It’s normal for your application to take this long. Complex applications may take even longer than this.
It’s normal for your application to take this long.
Complex applications may take even longer than this.

sections.heading: Submit a web form : Option 1 of 2
items: You can contact us using our web form .

sections.heading: Call us : Option 2 of 2
items: You can use our automated telephone service to check the status of your application 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.
We also answer calls Monday to Friday, 8 a.m. to 4 p.m. (your local time), except for statutory holidays.
Call us via the Bell Relay Service if you are hearing impaired or if you have a speech impediment .
bullets: Voice to TTY: 1-800-855-0511
TTY to Voice: 711
